This is the lowest price we have tracked for this model to date, and you can learn more about it below.

Update 3/16: Wellbots has dropped the price even further on this bundle that gives you the DELTA Pro Ultra X and TRAIL 200 DC power stations – all at the former model’s $6,499 all-time low after using the code below – don’t miss out!

We’ve secured a refreshed exclusive deal from Wellbots that gives you EcoFlow’s newest DELTA Pro Ultra X Portable Power Station with a FREE 192Wh TRAIL 200 DC Power Station at $6,999 shipped, after using our exclusive code SPECIAL9TO5 at checkout. The DELTA Pro Ultra X on its own carries a $10,597 MSRP direct from the brand, but starts off lower at $8,299 here, with this exclusive deal mimicking the one that held on for the first two months of 2026 – first at $6,999, then later at $6,499. If you missed out on that previous deal, you’re getting the next-best price here with the $1,300 savings, not to mention the free compact TRAIL 200 DC station that carries a $200 MSRP but can more often be scored down between $139 and $109 on average. Head below to learn all about these two backup power solutions while the deal continues.

more…

items.title: Segway Navimow Spring Sale takes robot mowers as low as $799 (Up to $1,133 off)
items.summary:
Right alongside the recent launch of Segway’s Spring e-scooter Sale, the popular brand has also launched its Navimow Early Spring Sale deals with up to $700 discounts on the X3, and i1 series robot lawn mowers – plus, there’s even $50 bonus savings and $383 in FREE gifts to score on the former of the two series. Focusing on the more advanced options that have the bonus savings, you can find the X3 series deals starting at the Segway Navimow X315 Robotic Lawn Mower for $1,949 shipped, after using the promo code SPRINGX3 at checkout, which are notably the only models not available on Amazon. This starting model goes for $2,299 outside of sales, which we’ve only ever seen discounted as low as $1,999 in the past – including during Black Friday and Christmas sales. Now, you’re getting a larger-than-ever $350 markdown here to a new all-time low price, with the other variants in this series also hitting new low prices. Head below to learn more about them and browse the full list of deals while they last. You can also find the non-discounted and new X4 and i2 robots on the landing page here.

items.title: Save hundreds on Segway e-scooters during this Spring Sale event, like the Max G2 at $650 (Reg. $1,000), more from $150
items.summary:
Segway has launched its official Spring Sale with up to 55% discounts, giving folks even lower prices than its usual discounts so you can secure your new ride and start your spring adventures off right. One notable price cut is hitting Segway’s popular MAX G2 Electric Scooter and dropping it to $649.99 shipped, matching its Amazon pricing. You may see it bearing a $1,400 MSRP tag, but that rate is usually reduced to $1,000, with most of the discounts over the last year having kept prices above $750, with occasional drops to $700, less frequent falls to $650 (last seen during Christmas sales), and the one-time-only cut to a $530 that happened for a single day in December. Today’s deal gives you the next-best price from that low, saving you $350 off the going rate and even beating out its Black Friday pricing. Head below to learn why this model is so popular among riders, and also to browse the full lineup of deals.
